characters.appearance: A fair-skinned human right hand with the index finger extended in a pointing gesture. The nails are short and neat.
characters.demeanor: Neutral, robotic, interacting with the screen.

scenes.supernova_script:
Unknown speaker says: इंग्लिश बोलने में अटकते हो? [Stuck while speaking English?]
Unknown speaker says: Good morning everyone, I am excited to join this team. [Good morning everyone, I am excited to join this team.]
Unknown speaker says: Excited. [उत्साहित]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by addressing the common problem of lacking English speaking confidence.
- Demonstrates the core app feature: reading real-world English text (like an office introduction).
- Shows the instant tap-to-translate mechanic providing Hindi meaning and pronunciation.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
PRACTICE ENGLISH FOR 10 MINUTES A DAY
Good morning everyone, I am excited to join this team.
excited
[ɪkˈsaɪtɪd]
उत्साहित
I know it
Learn

scenes.supernova_script:
Unknown speaker says: I have always wanted to work in a dynamic environment. [I have always wanted to work in a dynamic environment.]
Unknown speaker says: Dynamic. [गतिशील]
Unknown speaker says: जो वर्ड समझ ना आए, उस पर टैप करो। [Tap on the word you don't understand.]
Unknown speaker says: I believe that dedication is important. [I believe that dedication is important.]
Unknown speaker says: Dedication. [समर्पण]
Unknown speaker says: सही pronunciation और हिंदी meaning तुरंत पाओ। [Get the correct pronunciation and Hindi meaning instantly.]
Unknown speaker says: Thank you for this wonderful opportunity. [Thank you for this wonderful opportunity.]
Unknown speaker says: Opportunity. [अवसर]
Unknown speaker says: रोज़ 10 मिनट प्रैक्टिस करो। आज ही Supernova डाउनलोड करो! [Practice 10 minutes daily. Download Supernova today!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Continues demonstrating the tap-to-translate feature with practical workplace vocabulary.
- The warm, encouraging voiceover reinforces the ease of use, highlighting instant pronunciation and Hindi meanings.
- Ends with a strong call-to-action to build a daily learning habit with Supernova.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:

Good morning everyone, I am excited to join this team. I have always wanted to work in a dynamic environment. I believe that dedication is important. Thank you for this wonderful opportunity.
